metrics.description: Median measured execution time of the sparse_attn_fwd CUDA kernel on B200 via kineto, after warmup, median over 3 passes of 30 timed runs. This is the ground truth the analytical micro-kernel model must predict (target whole-kernel MAPE < 10%).
metrics.label: Measured kernel latency (us)

metrics.description: Achieved compute throughput = fwd_flop / latency. Cross-validates measurement (v32 ~1429 TFLOPS aligns with FlashMLA README B200 up-to-1450 TFlops).
metrics.label: Achieved TFLOPS

metrics.description: Achieved effective HBM bandwidth = fwd_mem_vol / latency; supports memory-bound classification in the stage-centric model.
metrics.label: Achieved HBM bandwidth (TB/s)

metrics.description: Relative error of naive datasheet-peak roofline vs measured latency (12-25% here). Context-only: the bar the interpretable micro-kernel model must beat.
metrics.derivation: abs(max(fwd_flop/peak_tflops, fwd_mem_vol/peak_bw) - latency)/latency; B200 bf16 2250 TFLOPS, HBM 8 TB/s.
metrics.label: Naive roofline relative error
